title: Quick snapshot from the gold EA I’ve been
author: Loose-Object-8913
selftext:
Nothing fancy, just a quick screenshot from the gold EA I’ve been letting run on XAUUSD.

It’s a super simple trend-continuation setup:

•  Checks the H4 direction first

•  Takes entries on the H1

•  Only adds to the position when price keeps moving in the trend (no averaging down, no martingale nonsense)

This particular run was one of the cleaner ones — it stacked a few buys as gold just kept grinding higher. You can see the three open positions and how it trailed along with the move.

I’m still letting the EA run live and just watching how it behaves day-to-day. No big claims, just sharing the actual chart from one decent move.

Anyone else running something similar on gold? Would love to hear what you’re seeing.
